面试官只能有一个反馈: The interviewer can only have one feedback
面试官只能有一个: There can only be one interviewer
微信发起视频群聊。: WeChat initiates a group video chat.
你负责提问维度: You are responsible for asking the dimensions
考察维度和参考题库: Examination dimensions and reference question bank
Click on the candidate to edit the interviewer and interview discussion group:
Indicates the interviewer who has filled out the interview feedback.
Assign an interview discussion group to each candidate through the "Modify Interview" function of the candidate list.
If candidate A belongs to interview discussion group C, then all interviewers of A are participants of C.
Participants in C have access to application forms and interview pages for all candidates belonging to C.
When the status of C is "on", participants of C can see and enter C on the "My Interview" page.
新建面试讨论组: Create a new interview discussion group
即可看到面试信息: You can see the interview information
《学生通信原则》自学与评测: Self-study and evaluation of "Principles of Student Communication"
《社会导师手册》自学与评测: Self-study and evaluation of "Social Mentor's Handbook"
We will re-evaluate once a year. Thank you for your understanding and support.
The principles of tutor interviews are consistent with student interviews, so tutors and student interviewers use the same set of test questions.
